views.markdown: A pure-software wireless CarPlay receiver for jailbroken cellular iPads. Showcase lets a supported iPad appear as a CarPlay car, receives the encrypted H.264 screen stream, and sends touch input back to the iPhone.
Cellular iPad with Personal Hotspot available.
Bundled BTstack runtime files and OpenSSL libssl3.
Showcase takes over classic Bluetooth while it is running, then restores Apple's bluetoothd when stopped.
Diagnostics and packet dumps are off by default. Enable them from the info button only when collecting a report.
Experimental Dopamine/rootless build for iOS 15-17, including the patched BTstack runtime.
Adds iPhone-sized UI support for testing on smaller screens.
Keeps the rootful iOS 12-14 build available and updates both packages to the same beta 2 line.
Diagnostics are now opt-in, with log export, network dump export, and a clear logs/dumps action in the info sheet.
Compatibility testing is ongoing across devices and jailbreak environments.
Initial public beta for rootful iOS 12-era cellular iPads.
Implements the wireless CarPlay receiver flow, bundled BTstack Bluetooth path, iAP2 authentication, AirPlay setup, encrypted video, and touch input.
